title: UK Health Security Agency business plan 2024 to 2025
body: "The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) business plan for 2024 to 2025 outlines the agency’s key deliverables and activities to protect and improve the public’s health and reduce health inequalities. It is underpinned by internal plans and performance management frameworks to drive delivery.   The business plan is one of a series of documents that set out the agency’s priorities and accountabilities, along with the UKHSA strategic plan 2023 to 2026  and the 2024 to 2025 UKHSA remit letter from ministers.  "
